category_sources: Official Apache Groovy download page describes SDK distribution artifacts combining source, binary, and docs.
source_facts.description: SDK for Groovy: a Java-based scripting language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as SDK for Groovy.
docs_sources: Official Apache Groovy download page describes SDK convenience artifacts.
Official Groovy documentation is the primary documentation surface for Groovy SDK contents.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Groovy SDK is built from Apache Groovy, whose official Git repository is gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/groovy.git.
tags_sources: Official Apache Groovy download page describes SDK artifacts and documentation distribution.
source_facts.description identifies the SDK for Groovy.
